records.ety: [Cf. OE. blacche in blacchepot blacking pot, akin to black, as bleach is akin to bleak. See Black, a., or cf. Blot a spot.]

defs: A blot or spot, as of color or of ink; especially a large or irregular spot. Also Fig.; as, a moral blotch.
quotes: Spots and blotches . . . some red, others yellow.

defs: A large pustule, or a coarse eruption.
quotes: Foul scurf and blotches him defile.
